title: CatModServ [ARCHIVED]
description: A ModPack pefect for beginners who want to host their own server
body:
#  CatModServ

**CatModServ** is a lightweight, Server-Side modpack designed to give your game a massive performance boost as well as protecting you Server from cheaters. Whether your server is a "potato" PC or a high-end rig, these mods ensure to give your server high preformance and protected from cheaters.

It was made with **Safty First** in mind, built on the **Fabric** loader for the best possible frame rates and modern compatibility.

---

# [Things you shoud be aware of]

1.  ~~**ClientID**~~ removed due to conflicts
    
2. It uses **GrimAC** for protection


---

### Mod Highlights
To keep your server purring, we’ve included the gold standard of optimization and protection:
* **GrimAC** – The best free anticheat you'll ever need.
* **FerriteCore** – Squeezes down memory usage so you can play with less RAM.
* and **MORE!**

---

###  Give us a Meow! (Feedback)
Found a bug or have a suggestion to make the pack even faster? Don't be a scaredy-cat—I want to hear from you!

*  **Comments:** Leave a comment here on [this github page](https://github.com/16X16PixelCat-Studio/CatModServ).
*  **Support:** If this pack helped your Server, consider leaving a **Star** or a **Follow**—it helps more people find the pack!

---
*Thats about it!*
